title: Errors, Cleanup, and Root-Cause Debugging · Runtime Trace: Try Catch Finally
summary: Diagnose malformed records and failed operations while keeping cleanup, user recovery, and causal evidence intact. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js try catch finally increment in a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Place try, catch, and finally around the smallest recoverable boundary without swallowing failures or overriding control flow.
Throw Error objects with stable messages, structured context, and preserved causes without exposing secrets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
